query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM players) as total_players,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) FROM cycle_history WHERE userId IS NOT NULL) as users_with_cycles,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history) as total_cycles;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM players) as total_players,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) FROM cycle_history WHERE userId IS NOT NULL) as users_with_cycles,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history) as total_cycles;
